name: @forgeax/apps-shared
description: Shared demo bootstrap helpers for apps/* (D-P4 path-A; populateDemoWorld and friends).

bundle-size.reason: demo bootstrap helper consumed by sibling apps/* via tsconfig path mapping; no standalone dist artefact (D-P4 minimal form)

fps.reason: no runtime canvas; fps reported by hello-cube / inspector-demo consumers

bench.reason: no perf-critical surface; consumers exercise the helper via their own e2e smoke / vitest runs

spike-report.reason: not a spike package; clone #2 cash-out audit lives at .forgeax-harness/forgeax-loop/feat-20260514-ci-jscpd-duplication-gate/
